name: Cacticus - Terrible Summoner(ft. Doom Stinger)
description:

Frogasaur: “Oh no...it’s happening again. This is the second time someone I’ve cared about got brainwashed. First it was Boaragon, now it’s Hydro-Sting. Why? Why does this keep happening?!
